overview: Premium 3D animated portfolio website for Makeup by Pinkie Thakur — a luxury makeup artist studio in Kalyan, Maharashtra. Features stunning Three.js animations, celebrity work showcases, Indian client testimonials, services gallery, and floating contact buttons in a beige and brown luxury theme.
features: Full 3D animated hero section with Three.js floating objects
Premium beige and brown luxury theme with glow effects
Portfolio gallery with all client photos
Why Choose Us section with animated icons
